name: Zephyr
who:
Air elemental familiar of the Arcane Circle
Ancient being of wind and lightning
Bound willingly to serve those worthy
Potential companion upon completing circle questline
Curious about the material world
what:
Circle's bound elemental and guardian
Master of wind and storm magic
Can scout areas others cannot reach
Potential companion if chosen over Lyris
where:
Dalhurst - Arcane Circle Tower
Available as companion after questline completion
quests: Arcane Circle Magus Trial reward choice

sprite.notes: Swirling form of wind and lightning, vaguely humanoid shape

dialogue.notes: Speaks in whispers, ancient perspective, curious about material realm

combat.notes: Flying unit - can't be knocked down, wind and lightning attacks

follower.notes: Unique mobility, knockback, chain lightning, stealth capability
